company_summary: Single-location dental practice with growing AR over 90 days and manual insurance follow-up.
main_pains: AR aging buckets deteriorating quarter over quarter
Insurance denials tracked in spreadsheets with no owner
Statements sent inconsistently after EOB delays
notes: Collections risk is the clearest near-term cash impact; operations automation is secondary.

company_summary: Medical aesthetics clinic focused on consult-to-treatment conversion and package utilization.
main_pains: Pipeline value by provider is opaque
Sold packages under-utilized; no automated nudges
High no-show rate on high-value appointments
notes: Revenue leakage is primarily funnel and utilization, not overdue balances.

company_summary: HVAC and plumbing field services company with dispatch bottlenecks and delayed invoicing.
main_pains: Double-booking and underutilized tech time
Invoices sometimes sent weeks after job close
Parts delays not proactively communicated to customers
notes: Scheduling and job completion discipline drive cash timing; collections supports late invoice follow-up.

company_summary: Dermatology clinic with long wait to first treatment and ad hoc collections when payment plans fail.
main_pains: Capacity mismatch between diagnosis and first treatment slot
Patient education materials outdated affecting conversion
Failed payment plans handled reactively
notes: All three domains show material pain; sequencing should reflect capacity and cash risk together.

company_summary: Pediatric dental practice with Medicaid mix, last-minute cancellations, and insurance EOB delays.
main_pains: Hard-to-refill short-notice cancellations
Treatment coordinator follow-up scripts not standardized
Outstanding balances after slow EOB processing
notes: Fill rate and AR are both acute; broad ops automation is lower evidence in the audit.

company_summary: Commercial cleaning company scaling crews; quotes are slow and some clients on informal Net-60.
main_pains: Quote turnaround loses deals to faster competitors
Crew check-in/out on paper
Informal credit terms without underwriting
notes: Win rate and operational scale are primary; collections process is immature but not the headline pain.

company_summary: Oral surgery center with referral communication gaps and pre-auth paperwork backlog.
main_pains: Referring dentists not consistently updated on case status
Pre-authorization paperwork backlog delaying cases
High-value cases sometimes stall in scheduling
available_data: Referral log in practice management system
notes: Coordination and case progression dominate; collections mentioned only for isolated balance edge cases.

company_summary: Small B2B parts distributor with steady revenue but chronic DSO extension on key accounts.
main_pains: DSO creeping up on top 20 accounts
No structured escalation path before legal
Credit limits reviewed annually at best
notes: Narrow, well-defined receivables problem; other domains lack supporting detail in the audit.

company_summary: Regional fitness studio chain piloting corporate wellness packages with inconsistent enrollment tracking.
main_pains: Corporate deal pipeline not visible to franchise owners
Enrollment vs. contracted seats poorly reconciled
Membership billing disputes handled manually per location
notes: B2B growth, operational alignment, and billing exceptions all appear in scope from the same audit.
